name: workspacejson-codex-decorations
description: Surfaces recorded fragility, co-change partners, and receipt-backed advisory review for the file you are changing — Explorer decorations, a current-change view, and a status item, all read from your local .agents/workspace.json. No telemetry, no network.

workspacejsonCodex.decorations.enabled.description: Show Explorer decorations for the current-change decision recorded in .agents/workspace.json.

viewsWelcome.contents:
No `.agents/workspace.json` was found.

workspace.json provides portable repository evidence for the file you are changing.

[Open workspace.json](command:workspacejson.openIntelligenceFile)
[Getting Started](command:workspacejson.openWalkthrough)

No current change to assess.

Edit or stage a repository file to see deterministic partner and fragility evidence here.

[Getting Started](command:workspacejson.openWalkthrough)

`.agents/workspace.json` could not be read.

Deterministic assessment is unavailable until the file is corrected.

[Open workspace.json](command:workspacejson.openIntelligenceFile)

walkthroughs.title: workspace.json: Getting Started
walkthroughs.description: Find the current-change intelligence view, read the deterministic decision, resolve it, and use advisory review.

steps.title: Open the workspace.json intelligence view
steps.description:
Select the workspace.json icon in the Activity Bar. This view explains how repository evidence affects your current change, and the status bar mirrors the current deterministic decision.
[Open Current Change](command:workspacejson.focusCurrentChange)

media.altText: The workspace.json Activity Bar icon, the current-change tree, and the status-bar item.

steps.title: See what the current change omitted
steps.description:
DENY comes from deterministic repository evidence. Partner files are not edited for you — they are shown so you can include them, verify they are unnecessary, or revise the change.
[Inspect Current Evidence](command:workspacejson.inspectEvidence)

media.altText: DENY on checkout.ts with two evidenced partners omitted.

steps.title: Resolve the deterministic decision
steps.description:
As evidenced partners enter the change, every surface updates together: 2 omitted, then 1 omitted, then Partner set covered. Covered does not mean safe — run the repository's verification before treating the change as complete.
[Run Verification](command:workspacejson.runVerification)

media.altText: The 2 to 1 to covered transition, ending in 'Verification still required'.

steps.title: Run an independent advisory review
steps.description:
GPT-5.6 reviews a bounded evidence bundle in a separate read-only session. Its result is advisory — it can surface additional risks or gaps, but it never overrides deterministic enforcement.
[Run Advisory Review](command:workspacejson.runReview)

media.altText: Deterministic decision DENY beside advisory result PASS within reviewed scope.
